title: rubus armatipes
intro: Rubus armatipes, also known as thimbleberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is native to North America and is known for its edible fruits, which have medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus armatipes include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus armatipes can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
